markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To review Kalil's progress and refine the content production workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Workflow Reset:** The current process—using Atlas for research, then having Claude rewrite the entire article—is inefficient and unrepeatable. It must be replaced with a direct manual edit of Atlas's output.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [**Define "Good":** The primary blocker to efficiency is an undefined standard of quality. A specific editorial checklist is required for both Interwell and Immubit to provide a clear, objective target for the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [**Pipeline Optimization:** The Interwell pipeline was updated to use a simpler, more effective prompt. The goal is to automate all repetitive edits by refining pipeline instructions and adding new post-processing steps.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=2321.0)
  - [**Efficiency Target:** The 15–30 minute per-article editing target is a combined goal for human and pipeline performance. Kalil's current 60–90 minute time is expected for a new operator and will decrease with practice and pipeline improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

## Topics

### Current Workflow & Challenges

  - [**Interwell:** Editing takes 60–90 minutes per article.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
      - [**Primary Bottlenecks:**](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
          - [**Linking:** 20–30 minutes spent manually checking link relevance.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
          - [**Qualitative Edits:** Incorporating subjective feedback from Matt (e.g., tone, paragraph structure).](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Current Process:** Using Atlas for research, then having Claude rewrite the entire article based on a "golden standard."](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [**Immubit:** Generating 7 articles this week with no defined quality standards, which risks significant trial and error.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)

### The Problem: Inefficient & Unrepeatable Process

  - [The "Atlas → Claude Rewrite" workflow is fundamentally flawed.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
      - [**No Feedback Loop:** It prevents the Atlas pipeline from learning and improving, as its output is never directly refined.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=3516.0)
      - [**Inconsistent Results:** Claude's rewrites are not repeatable, making it impossible to establish a consistent standard of quality.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=2537.0)
      - [**Redundant Work:** The Atlas pipeline already uses Claude 4.5, so the post-processing step is a redundant and less controlled use of the same model.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=2564.0)

### The Solution: A New, Repeatable Workflow

  - [**1. Define "Good" with an Editorial Checklist:**](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
      - [**Interwell:** Kalil will formalize all feedback from Matt into a specific checklist.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
      - [**Immubit:** Nana will build a checklist for Kalil and Matt to review.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A clear, objective standard is the prerequisite for both efficient manual editing and effective pipeline automation.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [**2. Adopt the Correct Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
      - [**Process:** Run article in Atlas → Edit the output directly in Google Docs.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This provides a clear feedback loop for improving the pipeline and allows Kalil to internalize client preferences.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=3516.0)
  - [**3. Optimize the Interwell Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=2321.0)
      - [**Prompt Simplification:** The pipeline's prompt was updated to use a simpler, more effective structure.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=2321.0)
          - [**Old Prompt:** Overly prescriptive (e.g., "150 words," "mention X, Y, Z"), which forced the LLM to create dense, unreadable text.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=3624.0)
          - [**New Prompt:** Provides a high-level structure ("Define condition," "Mention symptoms") and lets the LLM fill in the details, resulting in more natural writing.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=2321.0)
      - [**Artifact Review:** The `company_context` artifact is too long (\~8,500 words) and likely duplicated. Kalil will use Claude to trim it and check for conflicts between all artifacts (context, personas, guidelines).](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=3900.0)

### Long-Term Goal: Automate Repetitive Edits

  - [**Strategy:** Automate all repetitive edits by refining pipeline instructions and adding new post-processing steps.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=2446.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=2409.0)
    1.  [**Manual Edit:** Identify a recurring edit (e.g., CTA placement).](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=2446.0)
    2.  [**Prototype in Claude:** Develop a reliable prompt for that specific task.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=2916.0)
    3.  [**Automate in Pipeline:** Add a new post-processing workflow to the Atlas pipeline using the proven prompt.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=2960.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This systematic approach builds a robust, repeatable system that reduces manual effort over time.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=2446.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kalil:**](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
      - [**Interwell:**](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
          - [Test the new pipeline with 3–4 articles, including one already run, and compare outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=3448.0)
          - [Edit the new articles directly in Google Docs to internalize client preferences.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=2409.0)
          - [Formalize all feedback from Matt into a specific "Interwell Editorial Preferences" checklist.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
          - [Use Claude to trim the `company_context` artifact and check for conflicts between all Interwell artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=3900.0)
      - [**Immubit:**](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
          - [Await the editorial checklist from Nana before generating articles.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [**Nana:**](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [**Immubit:**](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
          - [Create and send an editorial checklist to Kalil and Matt for review.](https://fathom.video/share/zgFvyEzqKbFzd47n4Tvvx2dPYpiemgVB?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
